summary: ISS-1607 (H2 stationary-spot framing) is closable via patch P2 in EXP-272: targeted substring replacement in docs/assets/eclipse-geometry-comparison.svg annotation panel. Three coordinated changes — first bullet 'totality circle' → 'totality track', ratio gains '294 km' for clarity, redundant red-text patch line replaced with 'Track moves; per-observer ~0.9 sec' (explicitly closes the 'spot moves with the Sun' rebuttal). Y-coordinates and CSS classes preserved. Prose is already correct ('narrow ~1.3-km-wide track' from EXP-254); only the SVG annotation needed cleanup.
fix_details_for_close: SVG annotation panel cleaned: 1.3 km totality circle → totality track; redundant patch line replaced with 'Track moves; per-observer ~0.9 sec', explicitly closing the the-spot-moves-with-the-Sun rebuttal.
